title: cyanus triumfettii subsp. strictus
intro: Cyanus triumfettii subsp. strictus, also known as strict wild chamomile, is a subspecies of the plant species Cyanus triumfettii, belonging to the daisy family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating insomnia, restlessness, and anxiety, due to its sedative and calming effects. The health benefits of Cyanus triumfettii subsp. strictus include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and promoting relaxation. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to calm the mind and body, promoting a good night's sleep and overall well-being.
